retry_reason: Operations are void and cannot fail; retrying is meaningless.
contract_summary: Destructor put-wrapper: frees the audit_reply struct and releases the contained sk_buff (via kfree_skb) and net namespace reference (via put_net). The caller must not use the reply object after calling this function. If the function is called with a NULL pointer, it silently returns. This function should be called exactly once per allocated audit_reply to avoid double-free or leak.

judge.reason: Primary purpose is to release references (skb via kfree_skb, net via put_net) and free the audit_reply struct. No significant non-refcount logic.

check.reason: kfree_skb(reply->skb) is a put on reply->skb.users.refs; put_net(reply->net) is a put on reply->net.__ns.ns.__ns_ref.refs. Both start from the parameter 'reply' and the access paths and type chains match the callee information and actual struct definitions.
